# Vendor Codebases
This directory contains all the codebases of vendor projects. The reason being that several projects like `llama.cpp` regularly introduce breaking changes. Moreover, by the branching naming conventions of the specific projects, it is not entirely clear or easy to checkout a specific version.

>**Note**: The vendor codebases are **NOT OWNED** or affiliated with **NexGen**. You must agree to the License of the specific vendor projects. By downloading the repository of this project you automatically agree to their respective licenses.

## Currently Vendored Projects are:
- [`Llama.cpp`](https://github.com/ggml-org/llama.cpp/tree/04eb4c446d22b63449d5dc41c038987d4d8cc3a6): version: `9549 (04eb4c446)` built with GNU 13.3.0 for Linux x86_64 [built with `-DGGML_CUDA=ON`], full commit hash: `04eb4c446d22b63449d5dc41c038987d4d8cc3a6`
